page_metadata.biotools__summary: Focal Adhesion Analysis Server. Implements a set of computer vision algorithms designed to automatically process time-lapse images of fluorescently labeled focal adhesion proteins in motile cells.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Focal Adhesion Analysis Server. Implements a set of computer vision algorithms designed to automatically process time-lapse images of fluorescently labeled focal adhesion proteins in motile cells.
